positive: A stylized illustration of a wise celestial owl perched on a glowing crescent moon, looking down upon a simplified, misty landscape dotted with bioluminescent mushrooms and ancient runes. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau and modern vector art, using deep sapphire blues, ethereal golds, and pops of neon cyan for contrast. The owl should have majestic, geometric feather details. The composition must be symmetrical, centered for apparel printing, with clean, thick outlines and minimal gradients to ensure screen printing compatibility. High contrast, linework focused, vibrant colors, flat design elements, symmetrical composition.
negative: photorealistic, complex background, gradient noise, blurry, amateur drawing, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, extra limbs, low resolution, fuzzy, jpeg artifacts
